title: Implement Wave 37 manager provider directory scorecard contract
description: Extend manager-safe provider list/detail endpoints so they support search/city/category filters and expose additive provider scorecard metadata without breaking current provider consumers.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/providers accepts additive manager filters for search, city, and category
GET /api/providers/{id} returns additive scorecard/profile metadata safe for manager flows
Existing provider consumers continue to work when they ignore the new nodes
